title: Tether Mod
description: Link players together and transfer damage.
body:
# For the new fabric verion: # 
![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50c535a6225d316b92857f29e0b389d8598112b3.png)

**Right-click** on the **entitys/players**, with the **tether** item, wich are supposed to be **protected**.

**Right-click** on **entitys/players** also **removes** the **connections**.

**Shift** + **right-click** to remove tether connections.

Connection **won't** work if the **tether item** is **not** in the **inventory** of the **protector**.

Feel free to use in modpacks.

# Legacy: #
**(Forge 1.21.1)**
**Right-click** the **Item** by the **player**, which is supposed to **receive damage**.
The **linked** tether **item** needs to be **inside** of the **inventory** of the **player** who should be **protected**.
If the **protecting** player has a **tether item** in the **inventory**, damage will **not** be **transferred**.

Shapeless crafting from 1x string.
Found in the creative tab Tools & Utilities.​

If you want the source code, just send me a message.

Feel free to use in modpacks.
